description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages schema, api, static, build, test, deploy, sentry_release, trigger, and security using the image variables (python:3.11.9, node:13.12, docker:24.0.9, alpine:3.11, openapi-generator-cli, sentry-cli). In the schema stage run a schema job on ${GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_PYTHON} that installs requirements and generates satnogs-network-api-client/openapi.yml, publishing the satnogs-network-api-client directory as an artifact; the api job on ${GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_OPENAPI_GENERATOR_CLI} then runs two docker-entrypoint.sh generate commands to produce a Python client and HTML docs, also storing the generated directory as an artifact. The static stage includes a static job (python) that installs tox and runs tox -e "flake8,isort,yapf,pylint", and a static_js_css job (node) that runs npm ci and gulp, archiving network/static/lib as an artifact. The build stage has a build job (python) that removes dist and runs tox -e build after static_js_css, a build_api job (python) that cd into the client, clean dist, and tox -e build after api, and a docs job (python) that cleans docs/_build and runs tox -e docs, publishing docs/_build/html as an artifact. Deploy jobs run on tags: docker (docker image with dind service) builds and pushes the satnogs-network image to the GitLab registry and optionally Docker Hub; deploy and deploy_api (python) install tox, clean dist, and run tox -e upload (the latter cd into the client) using PyPI credentials; pages (alpine) moves built docs and API HTML into public/ for GitLab Pages; sentry_release (sentry-cli) creates a finalized Sentry release with the tag; security jobs (container_scanning, dependency_scanning, sast, secret_detection) run in the security stage with appropriate needs and variables; trigger_latest and trigger_master (alpine) install curl, substitute CI variables into trigger URLs, and POST to them based on tags or master.
